docket_entries.description: STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM QUEENA HO FILED BY DAVIS & RENO

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DAVIS & RENO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NEWMAN, JONATHAN $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $120.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,120.00, PER STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT EXECUTED JUNE 24, 2008. DEFENDANT JONATHAN NEWMAN NOT PRESENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF DAVIS & RENO AS TO DEFENDANT NEWMAN, JONATHAN
CONFESSION OF JUDGMENT STATEMENT SUBMITTED BY DEFT.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF DAVIS & RENO
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY DAVIS & RENO AS TO DEFENDANT NEWMAN, JONATHAN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-01-2008 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAY-29-2008, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT NEWMAN, JONATHAN
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-01-2008 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF PRESENT. DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. JUDGE PRO TEM: QUEENA HO. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
COPYING FEES PAID BY PLAINTIFF DAVIS & RENO
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT NEWMAN, JONATHAN
